current_focus: Dedup-first planning after character evolution 2.0 foundation; the next critical gaps are semantic character mutation space, production benchmark asset suites, WFC pipeline closure, shader/export closure, and motion/material upgrades.

pending_tasks.title: Character evolution 2.5
pending_tasks.description: Expand CharacterSpec toward a semantic mutation space with archetypes, anatomy templates, clothing layers, accessory slots, and stronger pose/appeal objectives so search moves beyond local proportion and palette drift.

pending_tasks.title: Production benchmark asset suite
pending_tasks.description: Create benchmark characters, tiles, and VFX with structured metadata, acceptance thresholds, and automated validators so future evolution is judged against production-like targets instead of only internal heuristics.

pending_tasks.title: WFC tilemap pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: Add produce_level() to AssetPipeline, integrate WFC outputs into asset packs, and include connectivity/playability checks plus metadata manifests.

pending_tasks.title: Export pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: Promote exporter to a first-class stage that emits engine-ready bundles with atlas indices, palette data, manifests, and reusable metadata.

pending_tasks.title: Shader pipeline integration
pending_tasks.description: Wire ShaderCodeGenerator into AssetPipeline and support shader-bundle export with baked textures plus runtime parameter metadata.

pending_tasks.title: Per-frame SDF parameter animation
pending_tasks.description: Add keyframed SDF parameter tracks and true shape evolution over time instead of mostly transform-driven playback.

pending_tasks.title: Spring-based secondary animation
pending_tasks.description: Add critically damped spring dynamics for follow-through and overlapping action in characters, accessories, and VFX attachments.

pending_tasks.title: Reaction-diffusion textures
pending_tasks.description: Add Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion for organic textures and integrate it as an SDF/shader mask source.

pending_tasks.title: Quality checkpoint mid-generation
pending_tasks.description: Wire ArtMathQualityController mid-generation checkpoint into longer searches.

pending_tasks.title: Procedural outline variation
pending_tasks.description: Partially addressed by adaptive outline width. Full per-segment style variation remains open.

pending_tasks.title: Auto knowledge distillation
pending_tasks.notes: 12 rules distilled manually. Auto-distillation not yet implemented.

completed_tasks.title: Integrate particles + cage deform into pipeline
SDF primitive parameter order fix (all 16 shapes)
Large-scale evolution validation (4 shapes, 120 iters, avg 0.8371)
Full project audit and commercial gap analysis
Palette adherence compatibility fix for character evolution
Character evolution 2.0 foundation (silhouette/state-distinction scoring + diversity/stagnation recovery)
Character evolution recovery and metadata coverage
Priority and state refresh for next-session decision support

capability_gaps: RESOLVED-S018: Evaluator too lenient -> 12-metric evaluator with strict thresholds
RESOLVED-S018: CPPN textures too simple -> enriched topology with hidden layers
RESOLVED-S018: No bone-driven deformation -> cage deformation with MVC
RESOLVED-S018: Knowledge base empty -> 12 rules + 10 models registered
RESOLVED-S018: No reference image comparison -> pipeline passes reference/palette
RESOLVED-S019: SDF primitive parameter order bug -> all calls use kwargs
RESOLVED-S019: Palette not constrained -> Floyd-Steinberg dither in OKLAB space
RESOLVED-S019: Particles/cage not in pipeline -> produce_vfx() + produce_deform_animation()
RESOLVED-S019: No validation suite -> 19-test validation, 100% pass
RESOLVED-S020: No multi-layer compositing -> render_sdf_layered() + composite_layers()
RESOLVED-S020: VFX evaluator too harsh -> rebalanced weights, explosion 0.24→0.66
RESOLVED-S020: Evolution not validated at scale -> 4 shapes, 120 iters, avg 0.8371
RESOLVED-S021: Outline gaps at sharp corners -> adaptive outline width based on curvature
RESOLVED-S021: Texture layer empty in layered rendering -> render_textured_sdf_layered()
RESOLVED-S021: Evolution convergence too slow for complex shapes -> shape-complexity-aware params
RESOLVED-S022: Character renderer disconnected from pipeline -> produce_character_pack() + produce_asset_pack() integration
RESOLVED-S022: No multi-state character packaging -> sheets/GIFs/atlas/manifest export
RESOLVED-S022: Repeated session duplication risk -> session fingerprint guard added
RESOLVED-S023: No character search path before export -> baseline character evolution search added to produce_character_pack()
PARTIAL-S024: Character evolution lacked character-aware objectives -> silhouette and state-distinction scoring now added, but richer motion/appeal objectives remain open
PARTIAL-S024: Character evolution lacked diversity and stagnation recovery -> elite diversity, adaptive strength and restart added, but broader population strategies remain open
CLARIFIED-S025: Next high-value reference set distilled into research_notes_session025.md so future sessions can avoid another broad audit loop
REMAINING: Character mutation space is still too narrow for rich production character families
REMAINING: No production benchmark asset suite
REMAINING: WFC tilemap not first-class in AssetPipeline
REMAINING: Shader/Export modules not first-class in AssetPipeline
REMAINING: No per-frame SDF parameter animation
REMAINING: No reaction-diffusion textures
REMAINING: No spring-based secondary animation

new_artifacts: research_notes_session025.md: dedup-aware external reference synthesis for the next major gaps
SESSION_HANDOFF.md: refreshed priorities and next-session reading order
PROJECT_BRAIN.json: refreshed machine-readable priorities and focus

planning_improvements.next_session_entry: New sessions now have a dedicated reference-entry document instead of relying on another broad audit.
planning_improvements.todo_clarity: Pending tasks now reflect the real blocker order: semantic mutation space, benchmark suites, pipeline closure, then motion/material upgrades.
planning_improvements.duplication_risk: Reduced further because the newly harvested references are now distilled into a reusable note file.

recent_audit.summary: The project already has a credible character-evolution foundation and is no longer a demo shell. The biggest remaining blockers are semantic mutation breadth, benchmark asset suites, and first-class closure for levels, shaders, and export bundles.
top_gaps: Broader semantic mutation space for character evolution
Per-frame SDF animation plus secondary motion and organic textures
